chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-454 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on CMA No.6412/2023. 2. For orders on CMA No.1952/2023. 3. For hearing of main case. 09.03.2023. Mr. Usman Farooque, Advocate for the Petitioner. ------ YOUSUF ALI SAYEED, J. - The Petitioner seeks issuance of CNICs and Passports in favour of his wife and children. As is apparent from the case advanced, the persons for whose benefit such credentials are claimed are all apparently sui-juris, hence, ought to come forward in their own right if aggrieved. That being so, we are of the view that the Petition is misconceived. Hence, while granting the application for urgency, we hereby dismiss the Petition in limine, along with the other miscellaneous application. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
